{{Infobox group
| name = Vallenar family
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Vallenar family]] will control a third of the [[Zenith Starship]] if [[Benri]] and the [[Iron King]] take crew positions on [[The Last Horizon]].}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
